title: Ben-Gvir Storms Al-Aqsa Compound for Third Time This Year
detail: Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir entered the Al-Aqsa Mosque compound in occupied East Jerusalem accompanied by Israeli settlers, performing Jewish prayers at the site — his third such incursion in 2026. The visit violates the status quo arrangement in place since 1967, under which non-Muslim prayer is prohibited at the compound administered by the Jordanian Waqf. Palestinian and Jordanian authorities condemned the visit as a 'desecration of its sanctity,' drawing widespread Palestinian condemnation across the occupied territories.

media.caption: Ben-Gvir storms Al-Aqsa Mosque compound with settlers for third time this year

title: IDF Conducts Overnight Raids Across Occupied West Bank
detail: Israeli army conducted overnight raids across the occupied West Bank on April 12, 2026, continuing sustained military operations in the territory.

media.caption: Israeli army raids across the occupied West Bank overnight
